entities.name: SOYBEAN

entities.name: GLYCINE SOJA
entities.description: The wild progenitor of cultivated soybean

entities.name: EDIBLE OIL SEEDS
entities.description: Seeds providing oil for consumption, of which soybean represents approximately 56 percent

entities.name: VEGETABLE OIL PRODUCTION
entities.description: Global production of vegetable oil, of which soybean represents 30 percent

entities.name: AVERAGE YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, which has increased over the last 50 years

entities.name: CULTIVATED AREA
entities.description: The total land area used for growing crops, which has expanded over the last 50 years
